suggestions.topic: EIP-7904 formal status change for Glamsterdam
suggestions.rationale: Deferred from ACDE #237 pending Geth benchmarks by end of May. Expected revisit window has passed; needs confirmation whether to formally DFI from Glamsterdam or retain.

suggestions.topic: glamsterdam-devnet-5 status and client onboarding progress
suggestions.rationale: Devnet launched June 4 with 2 ELs + 4 CLs; Teku onboarding post-fork. Engine API PR reviews (#796, #786) were requested 4 days ago. Critical to confirm stability before devnet-6 scope finalization.

suggestions.topic: glamsterdam-devnet-6 readiness and EIP-8038/EIP-2780 repricing values
suggestions.rationale: Devnet-6 targets ~2 weeks from June 4 (approximately now). Scope includes EIP-8246, EIP-7997, plus repricing EIPs 8038 and 2780 with 'preliminary values.' Need confirmation on final numbers and launch timeline.

suggestions.topic: Hegota headliner discussion: EIP selection and fork scope
suggestions.rationale: Six EIPs were PFI'd for Hegota in ACDE #238 (8131, 8279, 7979, 8173, 7851, 8151), plus several from ACDE #236-237 (8188, 8182, 4758, 7709, 8253, 8163, 7979). Time to begin aligning on headliner candidates and overall fork priorities.
Deferred from glamsterdam-devnet-4 in ACDE #237 pending BAL Discord discussion. Needs resolution to determine whether this change enters a future Glamsterdam devnet or is postponed.
Action item from ACDE #238 (4 days ago) to schedule breakout once draft is merged. Greg Colvin and Protocol Support (Josh Davis) coordinating. Update on scheduling status needed.

suggestions.topic: EIP-8254 (deposit limit cap) and 200M gas floor path
suggestions.rationale: PFI'd in ACDE #236 as potential path to 200M gas floor, but open questions remain around block building complexity. Non-blocking update on design refinements or decision to proceed/defer.
Deferred from glamsterdam-devnet-6 in ACDE #238. Informational update on when this EIP is expected to enter testing, if teams have clarity.
